'''鈭歽-p-ch-h''' ('''kayapchehoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubicon|rubicon]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-p-ch-h
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubicon|rubicon]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歽-p-ch-h
|-
! Lemma
| kayapchehoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiyapchehoko|thiyapchehoko]] || [[word:jiyapchehoko|jiyapchehoko]] || [[word:shiyapchehoko|shiyapchehoko]] || [[word:kiyapchehoko|kiyapchehoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoyapchehoko|thoyapchehoko]] || [[word:joyapchehoko|joyapchehoko]] || [[word:shoyapchehoko|shoyapchehoko]] || [[word:koyapchehoko|koyapchehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙yapchehoko|th忙yapchehoko]] || [[word:j忙yapchehoko|j忙yapchehoko]] || [[word:sh忙yapchehoko|sh忙yapchehoko]] || [[word:k忙yapchehoko|k忙yapchehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathayapchehoko|thathayapchehoko]] || [[word:jajayapchehoko|jajayapchehoko]] || [[word:shashayapchehoko|shashayapchehoko]] || [[word:kakayapchehoko|kakayapchehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thayapchehoko|thayapchehoko]] || [[word:jayapchehoko|jayapchehoko]] || [[word:shayapchehoko|shayapchehoko]] || [[word:kayapchehoko|kayapchehoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thayapchehoko|thayapchehoko]] || [[word:jayapchehoko|jayapchehoko]] || [[word:shayapchehoko|shayapchehoko]] || [[word:kayapchehoko|kayapchehoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
